predictions.question: Bitcoin Up or Down on April 6?
predictions.reasoning_excerpt: Looking at the current data, Bitcoin has already moved decisively higher today, opening at $68,989.00 and currently trading at $69,312.50 - a gain of +0.47% or +$323.50. With the contract resolving at 4 PM today (in less than 3 hours), Bitcoin would need to close below its opening price of $68,989.00 for this to resolve NO. Given that BTC is already up significantly and has maintained this gain throughout the trading session, a reversal of over $323 seems highly unlikely in the remaining time.
